title: 4.1 Sample Index PCR
author: Opentrons
description: This is the third of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup.
steps_raw: This is the third of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup.
60 uL of index mix is added to the samples
The index adapter foil is pierced by multi-channel pipette
20 uL index adapter is added to the samples
Sample plate is removed to an off-deck thermocycler
materials_raw: Foil-Covered Index Adapter 96 Well Plate, 200 µL
Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Opentrons Semi-Skirted Adapter
Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Aluminum Block 200 µL
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
Opentrons 96 Tip Rack 300 µL or Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 200 µL
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
